top_signals.title: Kansai’s first Michelin-selected sommelier knows how to read a room
top_signals.summary: In April, Miki Tanaka was given the Michelin Guide's first-ever sommelier award for Kyoto and Osaka.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cybersecurity risks posed by over-the-air tech in autos has analysts concerned
top_signals.summary: The automotive industry's increasing use of over-the-air technology makes it more susceptible to cyberattacks, analysts say.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
